scripts.build: npm run lint && npm run format:check && npm test && tsc -b && vite build
scripts.build:test: npm run lint && npm run format:check && npm test && tsc -b && vite build --mode test
scripts.cap:copy: npm run build && npx cap copy
scripts.cap:sync: npm run build && npx cap sync && node scripts/ensure-zendt-ios-plugin.mjs
scripts.cap:sync:android: npm run build && npx cap sync android
scripts.cap:sync:ios: npm run build && npx cap sync ios && node scripts/ensure-zendt-ios-plugin.mjs
scripts.cap:sync:test: npm run build:test && npx cap sync android
scripts.cap:sync:test:ios: npm run build:test && npx cap sync ios && node scripts/ensure-zendt-ios-plugin.mjs
scripts.ios:prepare: cd ios/App && pod install && cd ../.. && npx tsc -b && npx vite build && npx cap sync ios && node scripts/ensure-zendt-ios-plugin.mjs
scripts.apk:debug: npm run build && npx cap sync android && cd android && ./gradlew assembleDebug
scripts.apk:test: npm run cap:sync:test && cd android && ./gradlew assembleDebug
scripts.apk:test:release: npm run cap:sync:test && cd android && ./gradlew assembleRelease
scripts.apk:release: npm run cap:sync:android && cd android && ./gradlew assembleRelease
scripts.aab:release: npm run cap:sync:android && cd android && ./gradlew bundleRelease
